rationale: Review 1's key finding—that general-purpose lemmas (BialgHom.map_antipode, Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id/map_comp, TensorProduct.antipode_tmul) are declared private and thus hidden from reuse by other TauCeti files—is real, grounded in the diff, and material for the reuse angle. Review 2 missed this entirely. The remaining findings about wrapper-lemma redundancy are minor and the review offers keep-or-document alternatives, so acting on them would not degrade the PR.
